title: Mr. Brightside
meaning_summary: Its singalong energy and constant rediscovery make it one of the most durable alternative-rock recordings of its era.
revenue_drivers: High playlist visibility and nostalgia replay sustain strong streaming.
Event-driven and social singalong use materially extend its annual value.
Cross-generational recognition keeps the song active at scale.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Mr. Brightside is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
